name: stawi-jobs.source.crawl.sweep
description: Every minute: ask the stawi-jobs crawler to enumerate due sources and dispatch them as per-source NATS crawl requests. The crawler itself is a pure NATS consumer — this workflow owns the cadence, and the admin endpoint owns the enumeration. Replaces the old in-process ListDue ticker so crawl work fans out to exactly one replica per source with no contention.
